title: Deliverable D2.5 Modus Operandi protocol
author: INRAE Transfert
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This report presents recommendations for a new  Modus Operandi  (MO) to guide the European Partnership on Sustainable Food Systems. Grounded in collaborative work and field studies, the MO outlines clear guiding principles, practical features, and Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) to strengthen partnership effectiveness and ensure long-term functionality.
steps_raw: This report presents recommendations for a new  Modus Operandi  (MO) to guide the European Partnership on Sustainable Food Systems. Grounded in collaborative work and field studies, the MO outlines clear guiding principles, practical features, and Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) to strengthen partnership effectiveness and ensure long-term functionality.
